title: Speaking – Part 4: Discussion
description: The examiner asks broader questions related to the Part 3 theme.

content.theme: the influence of technology on human interactions

questions.question: To what extent do you think technology affects personal relationships?
Some people argue that social media has made communication less meaningful. Do you agree?
How might advancements in communication technology change workplace dynamics in the future?
Is it the responsibility of individuals or companies to ensure ethical use of digital communication platforms?
What role does technology play in shaping people's attitudes towards privacy?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on online communication? Why might that be?

script.text: Now I'd like to ask you some more general questions related to the influence of technology on human interactions.
To what extent do you think technology affects personal relationships?
Some people argue that social media has made communication less meaningful. Do you agree?
How might advancements in communication technology change workplace dynamics in the future?
Is it the responsibility of individuals or companies to ensure ethical use of digital communication platforms?
What role does technology play in shaping people's attitudes towards privacy?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on online communication? Why might that be?
Thank you very much. That is the end of the speaking test.
